theme: integrated pest management in an agro-ecosystem
title: Rationed Sprays, Standing Guard
strategies: never spray, never release: zero risk, zero action -- reproduces the evaluator's own do-nothing reference, r = 0.1
spray full dose whenever P_t exceeds damage_thresh, otherwise do nothing; never release predators -- the obvious reactive rule

compute the critical predator density q* = r_pest/attack_rate, judge from spray_eff0/pred_kill0/resist_gain whether a short calibrated opening spray is worth its cost, release predators up to release_cap until Q reaches q*, hold it there, and ration chemical use to genuine emergencies
full trajectory optimization over the plan space using the known dynamics as an internal simulator to refine the predator-establishment strategy toward the season-minimal cost
